name: Token Observability
summary: Tracks and analyzes token usage and cost across AI coding tools.
description: Tracks and analyzes token usage and cost across multiple AI models and agents, providing session-level and project-level spending metrics. It directly accesses local session data from supported tools without requiring API keys or network proxies. Use cases include tracking per-project and per-model AI spends, identifying token waste for optimization, and analyzing code generation yield (tracking how much generated code was actually committed).

evidence.notes: CodeBurn -- provides cost and token observability for AI coding tools; integrated with 19+ tools.
